INVOKE.COMMENT: get the UMS Queue Ignore List File

MAP.COMMENT: conver size from integer to string

Values.value:
Dear Team,

Nobian: UMS Threshold Check in %Environment% environment

Threshold period: 10 Minutes
%emailBody%
QueueName No. of Messages Age in Seconds

Please take necessary action on the above Queues

Thank you!
OneHub wM Support

INVOKE.COMMENT: Capture Last Error from TRY Block

Values.value: Nobian: %Environment% UMS Report Generation Job Failed

Dear Reader,
Execution of Nobian:UMS Report Preparation job ended with an error %lastError/error% for the Service: "%lastError/service% " with ErrorType:%lastError/errorType%.
Kindly take appropriate action to regenerate the report.
Thanks and Regards, OneHubWMSupportTeam
